description: Enterprise techniques used by MirrorStealer, ATT&CK software S9022 (v1.0)
name: MirrorStealer (S9022)

techniques.comment: [MirrorStealer](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9022) has the ability to steal credentials from email clients.(Citation: ESET MirrorFace DEC 2022)(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha NOV 2024)
[MirrorStealer](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9022) can steal credentials stored in browsers.(Citation: ESET MirrorFace DEC 2022)(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha NOV 2024)
[MirrorStealer](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9022) has stored stolen credentials on the local machine in `%TEMP%\31558.txt`.(Citation: ESET MirrorFace DEC 2022)
[MirrorStealer](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9022) can target Group Policy Preferences for credentials.(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha NOV 2024)
